name: knowz
description: Frictionless knowledge management via the Knowz MCP server for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Query and capture knowledge across Knowz vaults
interface.longDescription: Bring Knowz knowledge management into Codex with vault-aware skills that query and save directly through MCP, plus setup and status helpers for shared Codex Knowz access.
defaultPrompt: Search our Knowz vaults for prior art on this feature
